title: SPEDAS Agent Kit analysis bundle run provenance
description: Machine-readable shape for the provenance/run.json record seeded by create_spedas_analysis_bundle. The record captures request context, artifact directories, MCP/resource hints, and append-only notes about tool calls, artifacts, and caveats as an analysis workflow progresses. Validation is shape-only; it does not assert that the science result is complete or paper-quality.

created_by.description: Producer of the seed record, normally spedas_agent_kit.create_spedas_analysis_bundle.

created_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp for bundle creation.

plan_path.description: Path to requests/spedas_plan.json generated with the bundle.

artifact_dirs.description: Named bundle directories such as requests, data, plots, provenance, and notes.

tool_calls.description: Append one compact object per consequential MCP/tool call: name, selected arguments, status, output paths, warnings, and timestamps when useful.

artifacts.description: Append one compact object per generated data, plot, table, notebook, or report artifact: path, role, source tool, hash/size when known, and validation notes.

caveats.description: Append caveat objects or strings for data-access, calibration, interval, proxy, or validation limitations.
